data.name: Accursed: Emma's Path
data.detailed_description:
Accursed: Emma's Path is an erotic story-rich dark-fantasy JRPG featuring a unique twist on the traditional turn-based combat system.

The story begins at the tail end of the 2nd Eos-Crisian War. Emma and the Hero's Party finally confront the powerful Eos usurper known by many as, The Demon Lord. However, during the ensuing battle he proves to be too strong and everything falls apart... 

Emma then awakens to an unknown priest in an unfamiliar land. She finds herself and her beloved Hero, Cross, befallen by an ancient curse stripping them both of their divinity leaving them powerless and Cross in a deep slumber. Emma must now unravel the mysteries that surround her and save Cross, no matter the cost. Will she triumph against the corrupting darkness, or will it consume her? To what depths will she go? The fate of Emma, Crisa and Eos lies in your hands!

Time of Day System

Each day is broken up into three major time periods; morning, afternoon and evening.

  • Work as barmaid, enchant swords, run a store, complete quests/story events, train, go fishing and more to pass time.

  • At the end of each week Emma must have earned enough silver to progress or face the consequences.

Corruption System

In order to lift the titular curse there are various seals that must be broken.

  • Each seal has rather lecherous requirements that will slowly corrupt Emma as they are completed.

  • Will Emma flash the men? Watch the couple have sex? Service the rowdy adventurers? Or search for the eldritch being? You decide!

  • Or perhaps you can find an alternate means to break the seals and keep Emma pure?

Hand Drawn 2D artwork

All 2D artwork in the game is drawn meticulously by hand.

  • Accursed: Emma's Path contains well over 60 CG sets each with countless variations and fully detailed backgrounds.

  • Meet over 20 fully designed NPCs each with their own desires and goals affecting the plot in intertwining ways!

Tactical Turn-based Battles

Accursed Emma's path employs a fun tactical turn-based system inspired by Bravely Default.

  • Bank actions for future turns or choose to risk it all and go into action debt!

  • Introducing an integral system for all combat classes: Mana Shields!

    • Balance your offensive spells and abilities with your defense mana shield as taking damage will reduce your available mana pool!

Exploration and Discovery

Like you'd expect from a modern JPRG; feel free to wander off the beaten path!

  • Find a slew of side quests, some of which will even affect the main plot.

  • Find cool items or talk to interesting NPCs and learn more about the game's intricate lore!

Story-rich VN-styled Dialogue

Unravel an intricate plot with familiar QoL elements from your favorite Visual Novel!

  • enable Auto-advance, fast forward/skip, view past dialogue and save/load during any cutscene!

data.short_description: Accursed: Emma's Path is an adult story-rich dark-fantasy JRPG featuring a unique twist on the traditional turn-based combat system. Guide Emma through a corrupting plot of intrigue and survive in an unknown country. Do whatever it takes to break the curse!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10/11 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better iGPU
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x720 or better Display
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: dGPU
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
